summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Urban Natura Barcelona Spring Boot application. All 18 test cases passed successfully including pagination, filtering, CORS, H2 database, and data seeding functionality.
passed_tests: GET /api/v1/products returns paginated response with correct structure
Search functionality by name and description (case-insensitive)
Category filtering by exact category name
Subcategory filtering by exact subcategory name
Combined filters (search + category + subcategory) working together
GET /api/v1/products/{id} returns complete ProductDTO with all fields
GET /api/v1/products/categories returns proper category structure with subcategories
CORS headers properly configured for http://localhost:5173 origin
Database correctly seeded with 16 products on startup
Nonexistent category/subcategory filters return empty results
All required ProductDTO fields present in responses
API endpoints respond with correct HTTP status codes
